_source: Distilled from the Zone Read sections of Cyclon's Definitiv Guide (https://www.definitivguide.com). Used with permission. Edit tips here, then run: node scripts/build-simple-sheets.mjs

zones.name: The Twilight Strand
zones.tip: Walk east / north-east along the coastline - Hillock is always at the far east end.

zones.name: The Coast
zones.tip: WP and exits sit at water level. Walk east/NE, drop a layer down for each ledge up. Long Coast? Log out and re-instance.

zones.name: The Tidal Island
zones.tip: Go left/west at the start; if you face a ledge, turn around and take the east side to Hailrake.

zones.name: The Mud Flats
zones.tip: The 3 nests form a triangle. Identify the variant (East/North/South), then chase quest markers in that direction.

zones.name: The Submerged Passage
zones.tip: Follow the zone and portal at the bridge - or portal when Flooded Depths appears on the minimap, then find the bridge.

zones.name: The Flooded Depths
zones.tip: Note which directions the zone dead-ends toward - the Deep Dweller is in the opposite direction.

zones.name: The Ledge
zones.tip: Always take the goat passage for the XP: hug the mountain-side wall through it, then the water-side wall to dodge Kuduku.

zones.name: The Climb
zones.tip: Follow the west edge - 5 slopes/ledges to the exit; the Legion monolith sits before the last two.

zones.name: The Lower Prison
zones.tip: Check north-east first: dead end = East variant. Trial straight from the WP = exit south-west; trial facing NW = exit far east.

zones.name: The Upper Prison
zones.tip: Check north-east first - dead end means turn around. Then follow the outer wall to the exit.

zones.name: Prisoner's Gate
zones.tip: The exit is always layers below the entrance: find the ledge side (opposite the mountain wall) and follow the slopes down.

zones.name: The Ship Graveyard
zones.tip: Follow the cliff side. Portal the Cave entrance when you see it; grab the WP at Cavern of Wrath - whichever comes first.

zones.name: The Ship Graveyard Cave
zones.tip: The Allflame sits diagonal from the entrance - zig-zag along that diagonal, avoiding dead ends.

zones.name: The Cavern of Wrath
zones.tip: Follow the water - the river flows in the direction the zone extends.

zones.name: The Cavern of Anger
zones.tip: Follow the water; the exit is the north-east corner. Upper bridge dead-ends = go NE along the west edge, else go east.

zones.name: The Southern Forest
zones.tip: Follow the cliff side / east edge north to town. Great XP catch-up zone - dense easy blue packs.

zones.name: The Old Fields
zones.tip: Follow the road; the Crossroads exit is at its end. If the road fades, keep its direction to pick it up again.

zones.name: The Crossroads
zones.tip: Static: the WP is central. Chamber of Sins NW of it, Broken Bridge NE, Fellshrine Ruins SE.

zones.name: The Chamber of Sins Level 1
zones.tip: The WP sits next to the passage down. Find the inner circular room, then take the passage behind the WP.

zones.name: The Chamber of Sins Level 2
zones.tip: Head south-east to find the trial; Fidelitas' arena reads from the trial's position and facing.

zones.name: The Riverways
zones.tip: Follow the road. Wetlands exit is NW of the WP along the worn path. WP seconds after entering? Reset the instance.

zones.name: The Western Forest
zones.tip: Follow the road to the WP. Weaver opposite side of the road (spiderwebs), Alira same side via the pebble path, Blackguards at road's end.

zones.name: The Weaver's Chambers
zones.tip: Follow the left wall from the entrance, always going west first.

zones.name: The Broken Bridge
zones.tip: Follow the road to Kraityn's camp. Optional: 3 exiles guard a jewellery stash in the left corner of the broken castle.

zones.name: The Wetlands
zones.tip: Move north to find Oak - check NW first, then NE. His camp is the only big structure; zig-zag edges on the minimap mark it.

zones.name: The Fellshrine Ruins
zones.tip: Follow the road through 3 walls; at the big ruin head NE into the Crypt. If the road splits, take the path leading east.

zones.name: The Crypt Level 1
zones.tip: WP below the start room's midline = follow the wall opposite it; WP above = the wall behind it. That wall finds trial and exit.

zones.name: The Crypt Level 2
zones.tip: Move the way the starting room exits (east or south) until the altar room; when forced, turn and follow the wall.

zones.name: The Vaal Ruins
zones.tip: Walk forward; at every dead end or edge, turn the way the zone continues and keep walking.

zones.name: The Northern Forest
zones.tip: Walk north to the WP, then follow the waterside east edge north to Caverns (west edge if water fully wraps the WP).

zones.name: The Caverns
zones.tip: Take the 2 bridges west, south to the corner, then east to the WP room. Exit is in one of 3 corners - check east, north, west.

zones.name: The Ancient Pyramid
zones.tip: 3 floors. Floor 1: check the corners; floors 2-3: the staircase up is diagonally opposite the entrance.

zones.name: The City of Sarn
zones.tip: Move NE to Clarissa (pillar by the first staircase), stay on the upper part for kills, then drop to the town entrance.

zones.name: The Slums
zones.tip: Go the direction that is not the dead end at the start; the exit is in a north corner.

zones.name: The Crematorium
zones.tip: Check west first: dead end = East variant; open south = South variant. Piety and the trial show through the fog.

zones.name: The Sewers
zones.tip: Fairly linear to the WP. Big room after the WP = 3rd bust left of the exit; small room = 3rd bust south.

zones.name: The Marketplace
zones.tip: Water west of the entrance = zone extends north, else west. Find the arch for the WP, then follow the east wall to Battlefront.

zones.name: The Catacombs
zones.tip: Move east if you can, north otherwise - the trial extends north/east and shows up fast.

zones.name: The Battlefront
zones.tip: Move NW for the WP (1st layer). Docks entrance north of the WP; Solaris Temple at the river's end on the 2nd layer.

zones.name: The Docks
zones.tip: You spawn near a corner - follow the wall the other way until the Thaumetic Dust. Every dead end holds a blue pack.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 1
zones.tip: Walk forward, turning the way the zone extends at each wall. The WP's corner points toward the exit side.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 2
zones.tip: Follow the red carpet. Check west first for the gap-dash skip; otherwise head the way the zone extends.

zones.name: The Ebony Barracks
zones.tip: Move north-east; semi-static. On the second visit the Imperial Gardens exit is always east of the WP.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 1
zones.tip: Follow the red carpet. First door faces south = exit NE corner; faces north = exit NW. The carpet forks the correct way.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 2
zones.tip: Semi-static. At the wagons by the 3rd staircase, go the side with only one wagon; gates line up on north layouts.

zones.name: The Imperial Gardens
zones.tip: Follow the road to the WP. Library NW along the road, Sceptre of God NE via the wagons, trial off-road in the north corner.

zones.name: The Library
zones.tip: Find the WP and Siosa, then head the way the zone extends - the Archives room only opens from south or west.

zones.name: The Archives
zones.tip: Traverse clockwise; each golden page sits in a book alcove - quest markers appear when close, skip markerless dead ends.

zones.name: The Sceptre of God
zones.tip: 3 floors; stay in the inner square and check corners clockwise - no door icon on approach means wrong corner.

zones.name: The Upper Sceptre of God
zones.tip: Same corner rules as below; balcony corners never hold the staircase. Floor 3: walk center, then NE past the cage.

zones.name: The Aqueduct
zones.tip: Two parallel walkways over the water - when yours ends, a bridge crosses to the other. Dead ends hold blue packs.

zones.name: The Dried Lake
zones.tip: Move toward the book icon the moment it appears - Voll's arena shows on the minimap early in 9/10 runs.

zones.name: The Mines Level 1
zones.tip: Move north-west when you can, otherwise just follow the zone.

zones.name: The Mines Level 2
zones.tip: Follow the outer-edge path to Deshret's spirit (quest icon), then continue; hit the south edge = exit is the east corner.

zones.name: The Crystal Veins
zones.tip: The final room opens from south and west. South variant: stick to the edge opposite the first passage's direction.

zones.name: Daresso's Dream
zones.tip: Move east when you can, else south until east opens again; at the east edge go north. Two single-exit rooms = go west in room 3.

zones.name: The Grand Arena
zones.tip: Arenas chained by corridors: cross each arena straight; at splits take north (or west-into-north).

zones.name: Kaom's Dream
zones.tip: Linear S-shaped path - just follow it; take the lava-fall skips when they appear.

zones.name: Kaom's Stronghold
zones.tip: Linear snake. Big rock on the east side = walk straight north (that variant has a second staircase up).

zones.name: The Belly of the Beast Level 1
zones.tip: Move west if you can, else north, else east; turn around at dead ends and repeat.

zones.name: The Belly of the Beast Level 2
zones.tip: Move west to a dead end to identify the variant, then work north whenever possible.

zones.name: The Harvest
zones.tip: Static layout. One boss east of the WP, two west; log or portal between kills to save walking and refresh flasks.

zones.name: The Ascent
zones.tip: Move north over the long bridge, hug the east edge past the encampment, then west at the curve to the lever.

zones.name: The Slave Pens
zones.tip: Stick to the left wall from the start; at the fence wall go east, take the next opening south, then west to Overseer Krow.

zones.name: The Control Blocks
zones.tip: U-pattern start = 2-trench variant: dash east through the trench, grab the Miasmeter north, keep east. Else rooms run north.

zones.name: Oriath Square
zones.tip: Move NW past the bridge, west at the crossing, then NW again to the Templar Courts door.

zones.name: The Templar Courts
zones.tip: Exit is parallel to the entrance: follow the inner wall east to the courtroom, continue east, then north at entrance height.

zones.name: The Chamber of Innocence
zones.tip: Stick to the outer wall. The first elevated section curving south marks the boss passage - else the next passage south.

zones.name: The Torched Courts
zones.tip: Reverse of Templar Courts: work east to the courtroom, then west one corridor at a time (corridor west, corridor north, repeat).

zones.name: The Ruined Square
zones.tip: Static: S-pattern to the WP. Blood fountain straight west of it; Rooftop NE of the fountain, Reliquary south.

zones.name: The Ossuary
zones.tip: Double bridge north = North variant, else the zone loops south. Follow the inner wall to the Tomb, then lever back or log.

zones.name: The Reliquary
zones.tip: Pick a rotation and run the outer edge - quest items sit in the north, east and south corners. Ignore the vault.

zones.name: The Cathedral Rooftop
zones.tip: Move north-east through the center of the roof; rarely a blocked middle forces the east/west walkway.

zones.name: The Twilight Strand
zones.tip: Full-clear: sweep east-west-east to uncover the whole minimap instead of following the edges.

zones.name: The Coast
zones.tip: Act 1 rules hold: WP and exits at water level. Spot the direction the zone extends and beeline it.

zones.name: The Mud Flats
zones.tip: Move east to the edge - the Dishonoured Queen waits at the old Submerged entrance (Nessa marks it). Then north edge east to Karui Fortress.

zones.name: The Karui Fortress
zones.tip: Static: east to Tukohama's arena, exit north after the kill, east again, then north to the Ridge exit.

zones.name: The Tidal Island
zones.tip: Go west first; on an equal-width ledge turn around and take the east side to the storage chest.

zones.name: The Ridge
zones.tip: Follow the right wall from the start. WP west of the entrance = East variant; ignore side passages until the zone curves.

zones.name: The Lower Prison
zones.tip: Follow the right wall from the WP to the trial, then backtrack or keep following it to Shavronne's Tower.

zones.name: Shavronne's Tower
zones.tip: 4 floors + rooftop: follow the left wall on each floor; floor exits face NW/NE, the last is a walkway to a ladder.

zones.name: Prisoner's Gate
zones.tip: Follow the road toward Western Forest; Abberath's arena is in the side zone beyond the ledge, on the upper part.

zones.name: The Western Forest
zones.tip: Follow the road - a straight reverse of the Act 2 run, no side objectives.

zones.name: The Riverways
zones.tip: Follow the road. The pebble path at the WP leads to Wetlands; at the blockage head south for Southern Forest.

zones.name: The Wetlands
zones.tip: Follow the left wall to the boss arena (broken WP on the way). River curving north-east = arena on the north edge.

zones.name: The Southern Forest
zones.tip: Move east to the big mountain wall, then south-east along it; Cavern of Anger sits in the south-east corner.

zones.name: The Cavern of Anger
zones.tip: Follow the east edge. Zone extends east = hug the south edge; north = read the stair room's facing for the exit corner.

zones.name: The Beacon
zones.tip: North edge to the open beach, NE to the lighthouse ramp; walk the pillars into range, light the beacon, then set sail.

zones.name: The Brine King's Reef
zones.tip: Follow the east edge south-west; when the book icon pops, head north to the arena (early icon = NE corner).

zones.name: The Broken Bridge
zones.tip: Follow the road (north, then east). The dirty lockbox waits in the castle ruins behind the broken WP.

zones.name: The Crossroads
zones.tip: Follow the road to the WP: Chamber of Sins north, Fellshrine Ruins south. Old Fields is blocked off.

zones.name: The Fellshrine Ruins
zones.tip: Follow the road to the Crypt entrance - same as Act 2; the Sanctum icon pops when you pass its entrance.

zones.name: The Crypt
zones.tip: Same wall rule as Act 2 (WP below midline = opposite wall). Open the sarcophagus to reach the second half.

zones.name: The Chamber of Sins Level 1
zones.tip: The WP is next to the level 2 passage. Walk south, east, south to spot the circle room through the wall.

zones.name: The Chamber of Sins Level 2
zones.tip: Not the Act 2 pattern: south room dead-ends = go north-west-north to the trial, then follow the west edge to the walkway.

zones.name: The Den
zones.tip: Go the direction the zone starts you in, then turn 90 degrees right at the first intersection (NW starts turn left instead).

zones.name: The Ashen Fields
zones.tip: The entrance is right by the WP - follow the road south-west straight to Ralakesh's arena.

zones.name: The Northern Forest
zones.tip: Move south-west to the west edge, then north along it; portal at Dread Thicket when you spot it and continue.

zones.name: The Causeway
zones.tip: Move along the west edge north-east. Curved east early = stick to the inner edge, west when it opens; after the WP go south.

zones.name: The Vaal City
zones.tip: Move north-west, rounding walls westward; if a wall runs long, take its opening east then south-east to the WP.

zones.name: The Temple of Decay Level 1
zones.tip: Floor 1: follow the zone south-east. Floor 2 is an 8-shape: pick a wall and follow the outer edge - exit diagonal opposite.

zones.name: The Temple of Decay Level 2
zones.tip: The stairs point at the intact bridge on each floor; dash skills cross the broken ones. Then outer edge to the next stairs.

zones.name: The Sarn Ramparts
zones.tip: East to the rampart wall, north along it, up at the broken section, then walk the wall top to the staircase down.

zones.name: The Toxic Conduits
zones.tip: Go opposite the way the sewer door swings (or just always west first), then north whenever you can.

zones.name: Doedre's Cesspool
zones.tip: Cross the first bridge, west into the curve; a room splitting west = West variant (west edge south to the arena), else read south/east.

zones.name: The Quay
zones.tip: Follow the left/waterside edge to the sealed casket; at splits pick west (else south) to the resurrection site, then backtrack.

zones.name: The Grain Gate
zones.tip: Zones linked by indoor passages marked with corpses. Enter west of the WP = first passage north; south of it = passage west.

zones.name: The Hidden Underbelly
zones.tip: Stick to the west edge heading south; the curved tunnel's T-split points to Solaris (north) and Bathhouse (south).

zones.name: The Solaris Concourse
zones.tip: Battlefront rules. Orient first: a massive dashable wall = dock spawn, go north; house edge = backtrack, then north to the temple.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 1
zones.tip: Move east to the WP. WP in the west corner = exit north behind it; east corner = north, then the room splitting west.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 2
zones.tip: Head south; if the room below the start continues west, follow the north edge west to Dialla's room, else east.

zones.name: The Bath House
zones.tip: Portal the first room. Start facing east = south spawn: exit NE, trial NW corner; High Gardens exit north of the trial.

zones.name: The High Gardens
zones.tip: One long snaking path - stay on the lower layer; the steps to the boss door appear after the long north-east stretch.

zones.name: The Lunaris Concourse
zones.tip: Ebony Barracks rules: WP north-east of the entrance, Lunaris Temple north-west of the WP, Harbour Bridge south-east.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 1
zones.tip: Follow the carpet north-east to the banks room, then follow its fork while hugging the west edge.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 2
zones.tip: Semi-static: at the flower pots by the 3rd staircase, go the side with only one pot; gates line up on north layouts.

zones.name: The Harbour Bridge
zones.tip: Linear: walk the middle of the bridge north-east until night turns to day at the boss door.

zones.name: The Blood Aqueduct
zones.tip: Move north-east; when a walkway ends, bridge across and keep going. Side passages hold guaranteed magic packs.

zones.name: The Descent
zones.tip: 3 layers via supply hoists. Layer 1 exit is NE along the west edge; an east tunnel off the hoist = vertical variant, go SE.

zones.name: The Vastiri Desert
zones.tip: The WP is always east of the entrance - find it first; the storm chest sits N/E/S/W of it, then on to Foothills.

zones.name: The Oasis
zones.tip: Stick to the east edge: starting at the north corner go south, else north. East-edge spawn = sand pit in the west corner.

zones.name: The Foothills
zones.tip: Semi-static, extends north-east. WP and Boiling Lake on the 2nd layer north edge; Tunnel exit on the 4th layer NE corner.

zones.name: The Boiling Lake
zones.tip: Head north-east into the north corner - stone statues and the two sulphur fountains (minimap smiley) mark the Basilisk.

zones.name: The Tunnel
zones.tip: Linear: the trial is the first tunnel splitting east/west, then follow the zone north-east to the exit.

zones.name: The Quarry
zones.tip: NE to the WP, NE again for Refinery or Garukhan. Refinery east of the WP = arena SW; arena east = Refinery north.

zones.name: The Refinery
zones.tip: The boss arena is the north corner - follow the east edge; cross outdoor areas through the opposite door, moving north-east.

zones.name: The Belly of the Beast
zones.tip: Huge twisted tunnels: the north entrance curves east, then split NW, NW again at the cross, then the west tunnel.

zones.name: The Rotting Core
zones.tip: Main room: south-west, take the SECOND tunnel to the Core. Dreams are linear - Shavronne/Maligaro NW, Doedre NE.

zones.name: The Cathedral Rooftop
zones.tip: Bannon is right by the entrance; then head south-east through the roof's middle (east scaffold if blocked) to the exit.

zones.name: The Ravaged Square
zones.tip: Static. Blood fountain SE of the entrance, WP north-east of it - dash the broken north bridge or cross the lower one.

zones.name: The Torched Courts
zones.tip: Reverse of Act 5: corridors east to the edge, south to the courtroom, then west (south rooms first) and north at entrance height.

zones.name: The Desecrated Chambers
zones.tip: Chamber of Innocence rules: west along the north edge; the passage below the first south-curving elevation is the boss room.

zones.name: The Control Blocks
zones.tip: West along the north edge to the arena in the NW corner - or dash the first trench and read its direction for the fast route.

zones.name: The Ossuary
zones.tip: Follow one edge to the trial. The Bone Pits beyond are 8- or infinity-shaped; read the start corner after the first curve.

zones.name: The Canals
zones.tip: Follow the zone, north when you can. West tunnel at the first T dead-ends = East variant; dash skills skip the broken bridge.

zones.name: The Feeding Trough
zones.tip: Static: two walkways along the blood canal - take the west one (crafting recipe plus Sin) straight north-east to Kitava.
